odd.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_liv: <excited>The pen sleeps empty. I asked a bird to fetch one. It didn't.</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hoo: <excited>No hook. The ceiling stares down, so sad. Give it a purpose!</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_bas: <excited>Blood wants a home. The basin is that home. Build the home.</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.village_life.butcher_s: <excited>The butcher's cleaver has a name. I won't share it. Secrets.</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.village_life.slaughter: <excited>The slaughterhouse is where the cows go to practice being quiet.</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.village_life.tannery/1: <excited>Leather remembers. Did you know? Leather remembers everything.</excited>
odd.dialogue.main/1: <excited>Well, well, well, fancy meeting you here!</excited>
odd.dialogue.main/6: <excited>Ah, %1$s!</excited> What's the latest gossip in this crazy world?
odd.dialogue.main/7: <excited>Gather 'round, folks!</excited> Let me regale you with the epic tale of how %supporter% had a close encounter with a zombie! It was quite the sight, let me tell you. And guess what? <mysterious>I saw a zombie that's practically a doppelganger of %supporter% today!</mysterious> Can you believe it?
odd.dialogue.rumors.lore/3: <mysterious>You won't believe what I heard! Apparently, after that Ancient Builder went missing, they say 2DA50 just up and disappeared to the Far Lands!</mysterious> Like, talk about mysterious... No one has heard a peep from them since!
odd.dialogue.rumors.lore/5: So, get this. There used to be this super advanced race of builders, right? But now? <mysterious>Poof! Gone! Vanished into thin air.</mysterious> It's like they just pulled a magic trick and disappeared from the Overworld!
odd.dialogue.first.generic/1: <mysterious>Well, well, well, look who we have here!</mysterious> A lost soul, perhaps?
odd.dialogue.first.generic/4: <excited>Welcome, stranger!</excited> Have you come to hear our riveting tales or are you just here to add to the chaos?
odd.dialogue.first.settling/1: <excited>Well, well, well! Look who decided to grace us with their presence! About time!</excited>
odd.dialogue.first.settling/3: <excited>Ah, another soul foolish enough to join our madness! Welcome, welcome!</excited>
odd.dialogue.hug.success/1: <happy>Well well well, if it isn't my favorite visitor in the whole blocky world!</happy> Where have you been hiding?
odd.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>Ah, what a timely embrace!</happy> My heart was yearning for this tender moment of physical connection. Gratitude emanates from the depths of my soul.
odd.dialogue.hug.success/4: <excited>By the mighty Ender Dragon, you possess the snuggling prowess of a thousand fluffy sheep!</excited> Your embrace rivals the warmth of a thousand campfires.
odd.dialogue.hug.success/5: <happy>Oh, how delightful!</happy> Your hug has awakened a dormant spark of joy within me. Allow me to reciprocate this gesture of affection, dear interlocutor.
odd.dialogue.hug.success/6: <excited>My word!</excited> The temperature of your body is akin to that of a roaring volcano! <happy>Such warmth has invigorated my very core, like a cozy blanket on a winter's night.</happy>
odd.dialogue.hug.fail/1: <angry>Wow, you look like a walking disaster zone!</angry>
odd.dialogue.hug.fail/2: <angry>Pass.</angry> I'd rather be caught in a zombie apocalypse.
odd.dialogue.hug.fail/3: <nervous>Huh? Are you trying to infect me with your weird hugging ritual?</nervous>
odd.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <scared>Yikes! Keep your cooties away from me, you walking virus!</scared>
odd.dialogue.hug.fail/7: <nervous>Oh, um... I guess I should be grateful? Maybe?</nervous>
odd.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <flirty>Can we just freeze time and savor this sweet, sweet kiss?</flirty>
odd.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <flirty>My heart is doing somersaults, I might be head over heels for you...</flirty>
odd.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <excited>Whoa, this lip-lock is like a gourmet feast, with extra seasoning of pumpkin pie!</excited>
odd.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <flirty>Mmm, your lips are like the sweetest honey, I could savor them all day.</flirty>
odd.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <excited>Wowza! You've got some serious smooching skills, %1$s!</excited> You're in a league of your own.
odd.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <excited>Move over Ash, %1$s is the new reigning champion of kisses!</excited> *giggles uncontrollably*
odd.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <angry>Is that your attempt at a kiss? I've seen better kisses from a fish!</angry>
odd.dialogue.kiss.fail/4: <angry>Have you ever heard of breath mints?</angry> Trust me, they work wonders!
odd.dialogue.kiss.fail/5: <nervous>Oh, thank you, I guess?</nervous> Though I'm not sure if that was even a kiss.
odd.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <angry>Get off me, you clumsy oaf!</angry> Can't you see I'm not interested?
odd.dialogue.chat.success/6: <excited>Guess who I spotted the other day?</excited> %Supporter% strutting their stuff in a full-blown diamond armor! Total Minecraft fashionista.
odd.dialogue.chat.success/7: <whisper>Hold on to your pickaxe, because %Supporter% spilled the tea about finding a chest loaded with diamonds yesterday.</whisper> <excited>I'm talking serious treasure hunting skills!</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.success/12: <whisper>Hold onto your pickaxe, because I've got some juicy gossip about %Supporter% that will blow your mind.</whisper> You won't believe what they've been up to.
odd.dialogue.chat.success/17: <happy>Oh, the nostalgia hits hard sometimes!</happy> Those childhood memories, man. They were the best, like having an enchanted diamond sword in your inventory.
odd.dialogue.chat.success/19: <excited>Oh man, I've been itching to venture out to that other village nearby!</excited> I mean, who knows what kind of fantastic creatures and zany characters I might encounter there? Plus, I have a bunch of pals I haven't laid eyes on in ages. Can't wait to catch up with them and hear all the latest gossip from the entire realm!
odd.dialogue.chat.success/20: <mysterious>You know, every now and then, when I close my eyes and let my mind wander, I start daydreaming about this mythical thing called cheese.</mysterious> It's supposed to be this magical, gooey goodness that's so tantalizing and addictive. I can almost taste its creamy, melt-in-your-mouth perfection! Oh, how I wish I could get my hands on a block of that heavenly delight. But alas, it remains a distant, wistful fantasy for now. Sigh.
odd.dialogue.chat.fail/8: <angry>Why are you talking to me again?</angry> Ugh, you again? I thought I made it perfectly clear that I have no interest in engaging in pointless conversation with someone as insufferable as you.
odd.dialogue.chat.fail/18: <angry>Your babbling is like nails on a chalkboard, except I'd rather listen to the nails.</angry>
odd.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Seriously? I absolutely refuse to believe that all that nonsense actually took place!</excited>
odd.dialogue.story.success/2: <nervous>If only I had the guts to confront a creeper head-on.</nervous> Alas, I am but a trembling coward.
odd.dialogue.story.success/3: <happy>That tale you just spun was surprisingly decent!</happy> Did you actually come up with it yourself? Color me impressed!
odd.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Hold up! You're telling me that entire calamity unfolded just yesterday? I find that utterly preposterous!</excited>
odd.dialogue.story.success/6: <excited>Hahaha! Oh dear, dear %Supporter%!</excited> What an extraordinary individual they must be! Such magnanimity!
odd.dialogue.story.success/9: <excited>You absolutely must grace us with your presence later!</excited> I'm positively enthralled by the prospect of hearing more tales from your extraordinary life.
odd.dialogue.story.fail/5: <sad>I weep for the lost innocence of that defenseless sheep you so callously slaughtered!</sad>
odd.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*snort* Huh? Did someone say something?</sleepy> Sorry, I was busy dreaming of more interesting conversations.
odd.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>Oh, how my eyelids grow heavy with sheer boredom in your presence. Yawn!</sleepy>
odd.dialogue.flirt.success/1: <excited>You're, like, the most fearless person ever! No joke!</excited>
odd.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <flirty>Woah, you! Seriously, quit being this ridiculously adorable!</flirty>
odd.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <flirty>That was, like, the cutest thing ever!</flirty> I was totally smitten from the moment I saw you!
odd.dialogue.flirt.success/6: <flirty>Seriously though, how do you always look this outrageously gorgeous?</flirty> Whenever I catch a glimpse of you, I'm lost for words.
odd.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <flirty>Ugh, come on! You're totally making my cheeks turn beet red.</flirty>
odd.dialogue.flirt.fail/3: <angry>In your dreams, buddy. Actually, scratch that. Even in your wildest dreams.</angry>
odd.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <angry>Absolutely not.</angry> I'd rather be stuck in an endless loop of mining obsidian than entertain the thought.
odd.dialogue.joke.creative.success/3: <excited>That's the most fantastically funny thing I've ever encountered!</excited>
odd.dialogue.joke.creative.success/5: <excited>Hohoho! By the block, you're a riot!</excited> Have you ever considered a career in stand-up comedy?
odd.dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <excited>HAHAHA! That was a joke of pure genius!</excited> The laughter shall echo for ages!
odd.dialogue.procreate_engaged/1: <flirty>My heart quivers at the thought of our union, for only then shall I truly find solace.</flirty>
odd.dialogue.shake_hand.success/1: <excited>Ah, what a firm handshake you possess!</excited> It's like holding hands with a boulder!
odd.dialogue.shake_hand.success/2: <excited>Whoa, your grip is like a titan's embrace!</excited> I can feel the raw strength coursing through your veins!
odd.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/2: <angry>Nah, I'm good. Don't wanna catch your weird vibes anyway.</angry>
odd.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/5: <angry>Can you do me a solid and vanish into thin air? Thanks.</angry>
odd.dialogue.main.morning/3: <sleepy>Ugh, I'm still half asleep.</sleepy> How are you managing to function?
odd.dialogue.main.morning/8: <excited>Rise and shine, slugabed!</excited> Time to join the land of the living.
odd.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>Oh, what a sight! The sun is shining, birds are chirping, and I'm already planning my world domination.</excited> How about you?
odd.dialogue.main.morning/12: <happy>Guess what? I actually managed to get some decent sleep for once.</happy> Might as well push myself to the limits and see where it takes me. Game on!
odd.dialogue.main.evening/2: <mysterious>Can you believe how quickly darkness wrapped its mysterious cloak around us?</mysterious> How'd your day unfold, my curious comrades?
odd.dialogue.main.evening/5: <excited>Ah, the aroma of dinner beckons me home.</excited> Time to unleash my culinary prowess upon the humble ingredients!
odd.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>My weary bones yearn for sweet slumber.</sleepy> This morning was truly a tempest of troubles!
odd.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>As nightfall descends, I dare not venture outside for fear of lurking creepers.</scared> Safe indoors I shall remain, dear friends!
odd.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>*yawn* You're still awake?</sleepy> You must have a vampire's energy.
odd.dialogue.main.night/3: <mysterious>Ah, a fellow nocturnal creature! Don't you just love the peace and quiet?</mysterious>
odd.dialogue.main.night/5: <scared>Even with the guards, the night still gives me the creeps.</scared> How about you?
odd.dialogue.main.night/6: <mysterious>The darkness stirs something in me, brings out my inner tranquility. It's a magical time.</mysterious>
odd.dialogue.main.night/7: <mysterious>Daytime is for mortals, my friend. The night is when the true beauty of the world unfolds.</mysterious>
odd.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>I'm absolutely exhausted.</sleepy> Today was jam-packed, I definitely need a day off tomorrow.
odd.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>I can hardly contain my excitement to dive into my cozy nest.</sleepy> Goodbye, cruel world!
odd.dialogue.main.night/10: <mysterious>Sleep is for the weak, my friend. Embrace the night and all its mysteries!</mysterious>
odd.dialogue.greet/1: <excited>Hey there, magnificent being!</excited> How's the adventure treating you today?
odd.dialogue.greet/5: <excited>Greetings, oh magnificent %1$s!</excited> Your presence brings joy to my soul!
odd.dialogue.greet/9: <excited>Hey there, oh radiant being!</excited> I'm positively ecstatic to lay eyes upon your glorious presence!
odd.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <angry>Ugh, go away, you're the absolute WORST human being I wanted to encounter!</angry>
odd.dialogue.greet.negative/5: <angry>Back to annoy me, huh?</angry> You must have a special talent for being irritating.
odd.dialogue.greet.success/1: <happy>Well, ain't that just peachy keen? Delighted to hear it!</happy>
odd.dialogue.greet.success/4: <excited>Holy guacamole! I'm over the moon to hear that!</excited>
odd.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <angry>Ouch! Spare me your insincere apologies, they won't undo the pain!</angry>
odd.dialogue.goaway/5: <angry>Begone, you pitiful soul! Leave me in peace!</angry>
odd.dialogue.location.igloo/2: <mysterious>Hey, guess what? I came across this creepy igloo at %2$s.</mysterious> It's totally abandoned, like no one dares to set foot inside. <whisper>And let me tell you, I've got a sixth sense for the supernatural, and that place reeks of ghostly whispers.</whisper> Gives me the heebie-jeebies every time I pass by...
odd.dialogue.location.pyramid/3: <excited>Hey there, adventurer-extraordinaire!</excited> Guess what? There's this totally mysterious pyramid waiting for you at %2$s. <scared>But here's the catch - some daredevil tried venturing in a while back and hasn't returned.</scared> So, like, proceed with extreme caution, my brave soul!
odd.dialogue.location.ruined_portal/2: <scared>Prepare yourself for a spine-chilling adventure at %2$s!</scared> You'll stumble upon a portal from hell that's in ruins. It's so eerie, it could give you nightmares! But hey, as long as you avoid the magma, you should be fine. Probably.
odd.dialogue.location.ruined_portal/3: <mysterious>Listen, brave soul, if you dare venture to %2$s, you'll discover the remains of a once glorious nether portal.</mysterious> It's practically ancient history now. <whisper>The locals say there might be treasure, but trust me, no one in their right mind wants to get near that place. It's like a cursed grave, I tell you.</whisper>
odd.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <scared>Oh, you know, if you dare venture into %2$s, you'll stumble upon that ghastly mansion those illagers call home.</scared> Trust me, it's a cursed abode. Stay as far away from it as possible if you value your pitiful life, my dear.
odd.dialogue.location.monument/2: <excited>Bro, check this out!</excited> There's these legit stories about ancient ruins deep in the ocean over at %2$s. <mysterious>Like, for real, there could be some sick treasure down there.</mysterious> But just a heads up, it's gonna be like, super risky.
odd.dialogue.location.shipwreck/2: <whisper>Psst! You won't believe what I just overheard.</whisper> Some lucky fishermen discovered a shipwreck at %2$s. <excited>Now, I've got a hunch there might be some hidden treasure lurking beneath those waves. How exciting!</excited>
odd.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: <excited>Oh, you won't believe the strange sounds I heard at %2$s!</excited> <mysterious>It was like a chorus of singing Endermen and squawking chickens, all mixed into one chaotic symphony. Truly bizarre!</mysterious>
odd.dialogue.location.ancient_city/1: <mysterious>You know, I have this peculiar feeling that %2$s is hiding something extraordinary beneath its very core.</mysterious> I can almost sense the vibrations of secret passageways and mysterious caverns, just waiting to be discovered!
odd.dialogue.location.ancient_city/3: <mysterious>Have you heard the tales? They speak of an ancient city at %2$s, but oh, my dear friend, it's not just a city. It's a labyrinth of winding catacombs and enchanted tunnels, camouflaged beneath the very earth!</mysterious> Don't fret if you can't see it, for it's a realm shrouded in secrecy and wonder.
odd.dialogue.joke.monster.success/1: <excited>Bwahaha! That Skelly never stood a chance against me, puny creature!</excited>
odd.dialogue.joke.monster.success/5: <excited>Look at those clueless cave spiders, falling right into my trap! Mwahahaha!</excited>
odd.dialogue.story.exploring.success/1: <excited>No way! I'm totally gonna conquer the world someday, mark my words!</excited>
odd.dialogue.story.exploring.success/2: <excited>Whoa! The thought of exploring and traveling just gets my adrenaline pumping!</excited> I mean, sure, I love my village and all, but the wanderlust is real!
odd.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <scared>Is it, like, totally scorching over there?!</scared>
odd.dialogue.story.nether.success/2: <excited>Oh my gosh, you're, like, a total daredevil surviving in that, like, super dangerous place.</excited> I'm like, totally blown away.
odd.dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <excited>Woah, you must be, like, the bravest soul ever to set foot in that place.</excited> <nervous>Do you, like, even get scared? Not that I would ever admit it...</nervous>
odd.dialogue.story.enderdragon.success/2: <excited>Goodness gracious! So you actually went ahead and slayed that colossal beast, did you?</excited> The entire village will be buzzing about your legendary feat for centuries to come!
odd.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>No way! The Wither is like a one-way ticket to absolute chaos!</excited>
odd.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>Woah, hold up! You actually took down the Wither?</excited> That's like, mind-blowing!
odd.dialogue.stay.success/1: <happy>Much obliged, I positively relish the idea of residing in this charming village!</happy>
odd.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Fantabulous! I am absolutely smitten with the notion of planting my roots in this marvelous village!</excited>
odd.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/1: <excited>Alright, get ready for the ultimate showdown of rock, paper, scissors!</excited> Prepare to be annihilated, puny human!
odd.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: <angry>Were you raised by a clumsy creeper on how to charm the villagers?!</angry>
odd.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>Give it another shot, and I promise you'll regret it for a lifetime!</angry>
odd.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_cle: <excited>The cleaver is missing! The meat waits. The meat knows.</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_ski: <excited>The hide begs for the little knife. The little knife is elsewhere. Mystery!</excited>
odd.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hac: <excited>The iron beast whispers! It wants the teeth of the hacksaw. Who am I to refuse?</excited>
